programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Marvin Hagler
programme.desc: On April 6th, 1987 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Marvin Hagler for the WBC World Middleweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a twelve round bout that resulted in a split decision in favor of Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Andre Gorges
programme.desc: On April 14th, 2012 Terence Crawford fought Andre Gorges at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas in a bout that was set for 6 round and lasted 5 with a win by knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Jose Benavidez Jr
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2018, Terence Crawford fought Jose Benavidez Jr for the WBO World Welterweight Title in Omaha, Nebraska. In a dominant performance, Crawford showed out in front of his hometown, delivering a TKO in the final round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Julius Indongo
programme.desc: On August 19th, 2017 Terence Crawford fought Julius Indongo for the IBF, WBA, WBC and WBO World Super Lightweight titles at the Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln the bout ended in the third round by knockout securing the victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Shawn Porter
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Terence Crawford fought Shawn Porter for the WBO World Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In a very close fight, Crawford turned it up and put on the pressure late, delivering a TKO in the 10th round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Thomas Dulorme
programme.desc: On April 18th, 2015, Terence Crawford fought Thomas Dulorme for the WBO World Super Lightweight Title in Arlington, Texas. Putting on the pressure and showing his aggressive style, Crawford scored three knockdowns in the sixth round to get the TKO.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Viktor Postol
programme.desc: On July 23rd, 2016, Terence Crawford fought Viktor Postol for the WBO and WBC World Super Lightweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Scoring two knockdowns, Crawford dominated the fight, earning a much deserved unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Yuriorkis Gamboa
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2014, Terence Crawford fought Yuriorkis Gamboa for the WBO Lightweight Title at Century Link Center in Omaha. In Top Rank's 2014 Fight of the Year, Terence Crawford shined in front of his hometown, stopping Gamboa in the ninth round.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Roberto Duran
programme.desc: On June 15th, 1984 Thomas Hearns fought Roberto Duran for WBC World Super Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that resulted in a technical knockout victory in the second round by Hearns.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Kendall Holt
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2009, Timothy Bradley Jr fought Kendall Holt for the WBC and WBO Light Welterweight Titles at the Bell Centre in Montreal. Holt scored two knockdowns to keep the fight close, but Bradley stayed aggressive enough to earn the decision.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Ruslan Provodnikov
programme.desc: On March 16th, 2013, Timothy Bradley fought Ruslan Provodnikov for the WBO Welterweight Title in Carson, California. Provodnikov put up a very strong challenge in an incredible fight, but Bradley prevailed, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Two of the three men who brought in and helped to hang an outlaw have been killed by an assassin. The third man, Paladin, is staying at a hotel where one of the guests is the killer.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: While the survivors of an Indian attack dig the victim's grave, they discover a vein of silver. The strike ignites a wrathful dispute between the two prospectors and the dead man's kinfolk over shares of ownership of the new-found fortune.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister is taken prisoner by a trio of fugitives who need him as a guide on their escape route to Mexico. Left with his guns but no bullets, the sheriff searches desperately for a means of escape and must make a last-ditch gamble for survival.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An enraged Apache bravely kills the white man who murdered his father. Both Sheriff Hollister and the victim's brother pursue the Indian -- with very different goals -- and trap him in a box canyon that the Apache has rigged with dynamite.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunman Nate Crandall murders a rancher to steal $20,000. Sheriff Hollister gets to the loot first and locks it in a safe. Determined to get the money, Crandall involves young Jim Edwards in a plot to rob the safe and take the fall for the killing.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Reverend Tuttle is aboard the stagecoach when it is robbed by three masked gunmen. Sheriff Hollister suspects Big Jim Sten, boss of a nearby town, is behind the robbery. But when the reverend and Hollister visit Sten's town, a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Jett Sergeant, son of a notorious outlaw, sees Hollister kill his father in a shootout and vows he will kill the Sheriff. Clay tries to set him straight, but the youth teams up with two of his father's henchmen in a plot a murder the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Frank Leslie returns to Tombstone to marry the widow of the man he killed and pledges never to use guns again. But four brothers of Leslie's victim come to Tombstone intent on revenge, putting his oath to the test.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister and Claibourne journey to a neighboring town and find it evacuated in anticipation of the arrival of an outlaw band. Clay and the editor are captured and the leader of the marauders is killed as a new outlaw takes command.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey thinks this duel can't turn any worse... but Marik has all the pieces necessary to summon The Winged Dragon of Ra! Can Joey prevent Marik from summoning the Egyptian God Card, or is victory simply not in the cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba has all the monsters necessary to summon Obelisk the Tormentor to finish Yugi off! Though overwhelmed and outmatched, nothing is going to stop Yugi from trying to summon his Egyptian God first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.desc: Sam gets detention on the night of iCarly's 50th web show spectacular. Unable to do their normal webcast, Carly and Freddie do their best to get detention too so they can do the show from inside detention with Sam.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie are invited to Daka headquarters where they are offered a large sum of money to endorse Daka's new shoe, the Tech-Foot, on iCarly. But the shoes turn out to be terrible.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A big time producer wants to make iCarly into a TV show. But Carly, Sam, and Freddie are soon upset to learn all of the big changes the producer wishes to make.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly gets a B on a History paper she should have gotten an A on. Sam, seeing an opportunity during her weekly meeting with Principal Franklin, changes Carly's grade in the computer and surprises her with the straight A's.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam gets a boyfriend, and the two are inseparable. But when the relationship starts affecting iCarly, Carly and Freddie know they have to do something.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After watching a segment on iCarly that showed a man who sells illegal copies of movies, two detectives decide to use Carly and Spencer's loft for a stakeout.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly learns that because of her web show she's been given the opportunity for a full scholarship to the elite private school, Briarwood. Carly's not so sure about it, but Sam and Freddie know they have to change her mind.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's in need of some guy time, so he tags along with Spencer to go fencing. Freddie's a natural, but things get complicated when Spencer gets him involved in a match with the amazing Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When their friend Gibby is too shy to ask out the girl he likes, the gang decides to make him and his crush contestants in an 'iWin A Date' segment on the web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Ackerman, the gang's teacher, goes through a rough breakup with her boyfriend, causing her to quarrel with her students. A visit from Spencer to sort out the dispute turns into a date.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly steps in to resolve an argument for Sam and Freddie. Soon Freddie and Sam are coming to Carly for help with every single fight. Now that she's involved, how can Carly remove herself?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Benson discovers Sam and Freddie's relationship after Gibby, now the subject of Sam's abuse, concocts a plan to split them up. Will Carly fight for Sam and Freddie, or help Gibby break them up?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tells Sam and Freddie to try each other's favorite hobbies. Meanwhile, Spencer bumps into his old babysitter and asks her to dinner. After reverting to their old roles, will they stay together?
